summary: Backend testing complete for Partner Referral System and Staff Login Cards. All 10 endpoints tested. Found and fixed 1 bug (field name mismatch: 'active' vs 'is_active' in staff_cards.py). All 22 tests pass.

partner_referral_my_code.description: Returns partner's referral code, link, and stats

partner_referral_stats.description: Returns detailed referral statistics for partner

partner_referral_leaderboard.description: Returns top 10 partners by completed referrals (public endpoint)
partner_referral_leaderboard.note: Currently empty as no completed referrals exist

partner_referral_apply.description: Applies referral code during partner registration

staff_cards_preview.description: Returns JSON preview of staff card with QR code
staff_cards_preview.verified: QR code contains base64 PNG image

staff_cards_single.description: Returns printable HTML page for single staff card (Visitenkarten-Format)

staff_cards_a4_sheet.description: Returns A4 HTML page with multiple staff cards

staff_cards_all.description: Returns A4 HTML page with all active staff cards for partner

staff_cards_admin_all_partners.description: Admin endpoint - returns all staff cards from all partners

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Field name mismatch in MongoDB queries
bugs_found_and_fixed.details: Code used 'active: True' but database field is 'is_active'
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed 'active' to 'is_active' in both queries (lines 350 and 449)

critical_code_review_comments: partner_referral.py: Referral code generation uses partner name prefix + random chars (e.g., PPART0EY7)
partner_referral.py: €10 bonus for referrer, €5 bonus for new partner on successful referral
staff_cards.py: QR codes generated as base64 PNG using qrcode library
staff_cards.py: Cards support both single (Visitenkarten 85x55mm) and A4 sheet formats
staff_cards.py: HTML includes print-ready CSS with @media print rules
seed_data_creation: Created test staff member 'Test Staff Cards' with staff_number TE-010-002
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Referral and Staff Cards features fully tested. Bug fixed in staff_cards.py (active -> is_active). All 10 endpoints working: Partner Referral (my-code, stats, leaderboard, apply) and Staff Cards (preview, single, a4-sheet, all, admin/all-partners). Test partner has referral code PPART0EY7. Test staff member created with ID 7372225a-afdd-44d7-8d35-f0f37f86795c and staff_number TE-010-002.
